name: Soli-tair-ror
short_description: A Horror strategy game involving with the well known singleplayer card game Solitaire. Be careful of what might lurk around you, play the cards and see where the night leads you whether that be life or death.
detailed_description:
A game where you play Solitaire before your sanity runs out, and avoid the demon that lurks.

This games takes a spin on the classic single player card game Solitaire, and creates it into a horror experience for the player.

The game features multiple ways to die within the solitaire match, as well as other challenges to distract you from completing your decks. Keep the creature at bay, and skillfully complete the game of solitaire.
